lines.gurmukhi: ਲੋਹਾ ਪਾਰਸਿ ਭੇਟੀਐ ਕੰਚਨੁ ਹੋਇ ਆਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: lohaa paaras bhetteeai kanchan hoe aaeaa |
lines.english: Iron is transformed into gold, when it touches the Philosopher's Stone.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਪਰਸਾਦੀ ਘਟਿ ਚਾਨਣਾ ਆਨੑੇਰੁ ਗਵਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: gur parasaadee ghatt chaananaa aanaer gavaaeaa |
lines.english: By Guru's Grace, the heart is illumined, and darkness is dispelled.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸਤਿਗੁਰਿ ਮਿਲਿਐ ਨਾਉ ਪਾਈਐ ਮਿਲਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: naanak satigur miliai naau paaeeai mil naam dhiaaeaa |
lines.english: O Nanak, meeting with the True Guru, the Name is obtained. Meeting Him, the mortal meditates on the Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨੑ ਕੈ ਪੋਤੈ ਪੁੰਨੁ ਹੈ ਤਿਨੑੀ ਦਰਸਨੁ ਪਾਇਆ ॥੧੯॥
lines.translit: jina kai potai pun hai tinaee darasan paaeaa |19|
lines.english: Those who have virtue as their treasure, obtain the Blessed Vision of His Darshan. ||19||

lines.gurmukhi: ਧ੍ਰਿਗੁ ਤਿਨਾ ਕਾ ਜੀਵਿਆ ਜਿ ਲਿਖਿ ਲਿਖਿ ਵੇਚਹਿ ਨਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: dhrig tinaa kaa jeeviaa ji likh likh vecheh naau |
lines.english: Cursed are the lives of those who read and write the Lord's Name to sell it.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਃ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: Salok, First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਖੇਤੀ ਜਿਨ ਕੀ ਉਜੜੈ ਖਲਵਾੜੇ ਕਿਆ ਥਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: khetee jin kee ujarrai khalavaarre kiaa thaau |
lines.english: Their crop is devastated - what harvest will they have?

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਕਲਿ ਏਹ ਨ ਆਖੀਐ ਅਕਲਿ ਗਵਾਈਐ ਬਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: akal eeh na aakheeai akal gavaaeeai baad |
lines.english: Wisdom which leads to arguments is not called wisdom.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੈ ਸਰਮੈ ਬਾਹਰੇ ਅਗੈ ਲਹਹਿ ਨ ਦਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: sachai saramai baahare agai laheh na daad |
lines.english: Lacking truth and humility, they shall not be appreciated in the world hereafter.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਕਲੀ ਸਾਹਿਬੁ ਸੇਵੀਐ ਅਕਲੀ ਪਾਈਐ ਮਾਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: akalee saahib seveeai akalee paaeeai maan |
lines.english: Wisdom leads us to serve our Lord and Master; through wisdom, honor is obtained.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਕਲੀ ਪੜੑਿ ਕੈ ਬੁਝੀਐ ਅਕਲੀ ਕੀਚੈ ਦਾਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: akalee parra kai bujheeai akalee keechai daan |
lines.english: Wisdom does not come by reading textbooks; wisdom inspires us to give in charity.

lines.translit: mahalaa 2 |
lines.english: Second Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕੁ ਆਖੈ ਰਾਹੁ ਏਹੁ ਹੋਰਿ ਗਲਾਂ ਸੈਤਾਨੁ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak aakhai raahu ehu hor galaan saitaan |1|
lines.english: Says Nanak, this is the Path; other things lead to Satan. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੈਸਾ ਕਰੈ ਕਹਾਵੈ ਤੈਸਾ ਐਸੀ ਬਨੀ ਜਰੂਰਤਿ ॥
lines.translit: jaisaa karai kahaavai taisaa aisee banee jaroorat |
lines.english: Mortals are known by their actions; this is the way it has to be.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਓਸੁ ਇਛੇ ਸੋ ਫਲੁ ਪਾਏ ਤਾਂ ਨਾਨਕ ਕਹੀਐ ਮੂਰਤਿ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: jo os ichhe so fal paae taan naanak kaheeai moorat |2|
lines.english: Whatever they desire, they shall receive; O Nanak, they become the very image of God. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੋਵਹਿ ਲਿੰਙ ਝਿੰਙ ਨਹ ਹੋਵਹਿ ਐਸੀ ਕਹੀਐ ਸੂਰਤਿ ॥
lines.translit: hoveh ling jhing neh hoveh aisee kaheeai soorat |
lines.english: They should show goodness, and not be deformed by their actions; this is how they are called beautiful.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤ ਬਿਰਖੁ ਹੈ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤ ਰਸਿ ਫਲਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: satigur amrit birakh hai amrit ras faliaa |
lines.english: The True Guru is the tree of ambrosia. it bears the fruit of sweet nectar.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੁ ਪਰਾਪਤਿ ਸੋ ਲਹੈ ਗੁਰਸਬਦੀ ਮਿਲਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: jis paraapat so lahai gurasabadee miliaa |
lines.english: He alone receives it, who is so pre-destined, through the Word of the Guru's Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਭਾਣੈ ਜੋ ਚਲੈ ਹਰਿ ਸੇਤੀ ਰਲਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: satigur kai bhaanai jo chalai har setee raliaa |
lines.english: One who walks in harmony with the Will of the True Guru, is blended with the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਮਕਾਲੁ ਜੋਹਿ ਨ ਸਕਈ ਘਟਿ ਚਾਨਣੁ ਬਲਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: jamakaal johi na sakee ghatt chaanan baliaa |
lines.english: The Messenger of Death cannot even see him; his heart is illumined with God's Light.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਃ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: Salok, First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੁ ਵਰਤੁ ਸੰਤੋਖੁ ਤੀਰਥੁ ਗਿਆਨੁ ਧਿਆਨੁ ਇਸਨਾਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: sach varat santokh teerath giaan dhiaan isanaan |
lines.english: Those who have truth as their fast, contentment as their sacred shrine of pilgrimage, spiritual wisdom and meditation as their cleansing bath,

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਬਖਸਿ ਮਿਲਾਇਅਨੁ ਫਿਰਿ ਗਰਭਿ ਨ ਗਲਿਆ ॥੨੦॥
lines.translit: naanak bakhas milaaeian fir garabh na galiaa |20|
lines.english: O Nanak, God forgives him, and blends him with Himself; he does not rot away in the womb of reincarnation ever again. ||20||

lines.gurmukhi: ਦਇਆ ਦੇਵਤਾ ਖਿਮਾ ਜਪਮਾਲੀ ਤੇ ਮਾਣਸ ਪਰਧਾਨ ॥
lines.translit: deaa devataa khimaa japamaalee te maanas paradhaan |
lines.english: kindness as their deity, and forgiveness as their chanting beads - they are the most excellent people.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੁਗਤਿ ਧੋਤੀ ਸੁਰਤਿ ਚਉਕਾ ਤਿਲਕੁ ਕਰਣੀ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: jugat dhotee surat chaukaa tilak karanee hoe |
lines.english: Those who take the Way as their loincloth, and intuitive awareness their ritualistically purified enclosure, with good deeds their ceremonial forehead mark,

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਹਲਾ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਉਮੀ ਨੇਮੁ ਸਚੁ ਜੇ ਕਰੈ ॥
lines.translit: naumee nem sach je karai |
lines.english: On the ninth day of the month, make a vow to speak the Truth,

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਾਉ ਭੋਜਨੁ ਨਾਨਕਾ ਵਿਰਲਾ ਤ ਕੋਈ ਕੋਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: bhaau bhojan naanakaa viralaa ta koee koe |1|
lines.english: and love their food - O Nanak, they are very rare. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਦਸਮੀ ਦਸੇ ਦੁਆਰ ਜੇ ਠਾਕੈ ਏਕਾਦਸੀ ਏਕੁ ਕਰਿ ਜਾਣੈ ॥
lines.translit: dasamee dase duaar je tthaakai ekaadasee ek kar jaanai |
lines.english: On the tenth day, regulate your ten doors; on the eleventh day, know that the Lord is One.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੁਆਦਸੀ ਪੰਚ ਵਸਗਤਿ ਕਰਿ ਰਾਖੈ ਤਉ ਨਾਨਕ ਮਨੁ ਮਾਨੈ ॥
lines.translit: duaadasee panch vasagat kar raakhai tau naanak man maanai |
lines.english: On the twelfth day, the five thieves are subdued, and then, O Nanak, the mind is pleased and appeased.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਮ ਕ੍ਰੋਧੁ ਤ੍ਰਿਸਨਾ ਉਚਰੈ ॥
lines.translit: kaam krodh trisanaa ucharai |
lines.english: and your sexual desire, anger and desire shall be eaten up.

lines.gurmukhi: ਐਸਾ ਵਰਤੁ ਰਹੀਜੈ ਪਾਡੇ ਹੋਰ ਬਹੁਤੁ ਸਿਖ ਕਿਆ ਦੀਜੈ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: aisaa varat raheejai paadde hor bahut sikh kiaa deejai |2|
lines.english: Observe such a fast as this, O Pandit, O religious scholar; of what use are all the other teachings? ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਭੂਪਤਿ ਰਾਜੇ ਰੰਗ ਰਾਇ ਸੰਚਹਿ ਬਿਖੁ ਮਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: bhoopat raaje rang raae sancheh bikh maaeaa |
lines.english: Kings, rulers and monarchs enjoy pleasures and gather the poison of Maya.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਿ ਕਰਿ ਹੇਤੁ ਵਧਾਇਦੇ ਪਰ ਦਰਬੁ ਚੁਰਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: kar kar het vadhaaeide par darab churaaeaa |
lines.english: In love with it, they collect more and more, stealing the wealth of others.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੁਤ੍ਰ ਕਲਤ੍ਰ ਨ ਵਿਸਹਹਿ ਬਹੁ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਿ ਲਗਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: putr kalatr na visaheh bahu preet lagaaeaa |
lines.english: They do not trust their own children or spouses; they are totally attached to the love of Maya.

lines.gurmukhi: ਵੇਖਦਿਆ ਹੀ ਮਾਇਆ ਧੁਹਿ ਗਈ ਪਛੁਤਹਿ ਪਛੁਤਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: vekhadiaa hee maaeaa dhuhi gee pachhuteh pachhutaaeaa |
lines.english: But even as they look on, Maya cheats them, and they come to regret and repent.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਮ ਦਰਿ ਬਧੇ ਮਾਰੀਅਹਿ ਨਾਨਕ ਹਰਿ ਭਾਇਆ ॥੨੧॥
lines.translit: jam dar badhe maareeeh naanak har bhaaeaa |21|
lines.english: Bound and gagged at Death's door, they are beaten and punished; O Nanak, it pleases the Will of the Lord. ||21||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਿਆਨ ਵਿਹੂਣਾ ਗਾਵੈ ਗੀਤ ॥
lines.translit: giaan vihoonaa gaavai geet |
lines.english: The one who lacks spiritual wisdom sings religious songs.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਃ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: Salok, First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਭੁਖੇ ਮੁਲਾਂ ਘਰੇ ਮਸੀਤਿ ॥
lines.translit: bhukhe mulaan ghare maseet |
lines.english: The hungry Mullah turns his home into a mosque.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰੁ ਪੀਰੁ ਸਦਾਏ ਮੰਗਣ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: gur peer sadaae mangan jaae |
lines.english: One who calls himself a guru or a spiritual teacher, while he goes around begging

lines.gurmukhi: ਫਕਰੁ ਕਰੇ ਹੋਰੁ ਜਾਤਿ ਗਵਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: fakar kare hor jaat gavaae |
lines.english: Someone else becomes a pan-handler, and loses his social status.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਖਟੂ ਹੋਇ ਕੈ ਕੰਨ ਪੜਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: makhattoo hoe kai kan parraae |
lines.english: The lazy unemployed has his ears pierced to look like a Yogi.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਰਾਹੁ ਪਛਾਣਹਿ ਸੇਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak raahu pachhaaneh see |1|
lines.english: - O Nanak, he knows the Path. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਘਾਲਿ ਖਾਇ ਕਿਛੁ ਹਥਹੁ ਦੇਇ ॥
lines.translit: ghaal khaae kichh hathahu dee |
lines.english: One who works for what he eats, and gives some of what he has

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਾ ਕੈ ਮੂਲਿ ਨ ਲਗੀਐ ਪਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: taa kai mool na lageeai paae |
lines.english: - don't ever touch his feet.
